title: Midnight Smoky Sliders
description: Tender and flavorful burgers featuring a midnight-infused patty topped with a crunchy smoky bun.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Form the smoky patty mixture into 4 patties.
Season the patties with salt and pepper.
Grill the patties for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they reach an internal temperature of 160°F.
Meanwhile, toast the midnight bun on the grill.
Assemble the sliders by spreading mayonnaise on the bottom bun, followed by a lettuce leaf, a tomato slice, a smoky patty, a few pickle slices, and finally the top bun.
Repeat the process for the remaining sliders.
